Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.period.wwz

Class WWZStatistic

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.period.wwz.WWZStatistic
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPeriodAnalysisDatum
public class WWZStatistic extends Object implements IPeriodAnalysisDatum
A single Weighted Wavelet Transform datapoint. The comments for each data member below are taken from the WWZ documentation, (C) AAVSO.
See Also:
  • WeightedWaveletZTransform

  • Constructor Details

    • WWZStatistic

      public WWZStatistic(double tau, double freq, double wwz, double amp, double mave, double neff)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      tau - The time being examined, in time units.
      freq - The frequency being tested, in cycles per time unit.
      wwz - Value of the WWZ.
      amp - Weighted wavelet amplitude.
      mave - Mean apparent magnitude of the object at time tau.
      neff - The effective number of data for the given time and frequency.
